news.t: Leverage Shares by Themes continues to expand its single stock Leveraged ETF suite with OPEN, CIFR, GRAB, DUOL, LAC, and UPS

overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long GRAB Daily ETF (GRAG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in industrials equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Grab Holdings Limited (Nasdaq: GRAB) stock, less fees, and expenses. GRAB offers ride-hailing, food delivery, digital payments, and financial services across the region. GRAG was launched on Dec 11, 2025 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
